title: FAA & FAR — 财务顾问与代表 / Financial Advisers & Representatives
summary: FAA 规定谁可提供财务咨询、须持牌或获豁免;个人以委任代表身份执业,须 fit & proper 并经 RNF 登记。 / The FAA governs who may provide financial advisory services (licensed or exempt); individuals act as appointed representatives, must be fit and proper, and are registered via RNF.

sections.heading: 谁须持牌
sections.body: 提供受规管财务咨询服务的实体须持 FA 牌照,或属法定豁免(如银行、持牌保险公司)。

sections.heading: Who is licensed
sections.body: The entity providing regulated financial advisory services holds the FA licence, or is statutorily exempt (e.g. banks, licensed insurers).

sections.heading: 代表登记
sections.body: 个人不单独持牌,受雇于 FA 以委任代表身份执业,须 fit & proper 并经 MAS 公开登记册(RNF)登记后展业。

sections.heading: Representative registration
sections.body: Individuals are not separately licensed; they act as appointed representatives under an FA, must be fit and proper, and are registered on the public register (RNF) before doing business.

keyPoints: 牌照发给实体,个人是登记代表 / Licence is at the entity level; individuals are registered representatives
fit & proper:诚信/能力/财务稳健 / Fit and proper: integrity, competence, financial soundness
展业前须完成登记 / Registration required before practising
sourceRef: Financial Advisers Act (FAA) & Financial Advisers Regulations (FAR)
